arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale explains why he didn't copy Scott Carson by staying at Arsenal
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale returns to Arsenal as a Southampton player this afternoon adamant that it is better to play every week and not win a trophy than collect medals sitting on the bench

arts.ttl: 'Deserves his place': Martin Keown says Arsenal have an underrated player who plays every game like it's his last
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed a superb start to the Premier League season and are looking every bit title contenders as we approach another international break. The...

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop early Mikel Merino team news hint for Southampton clash
arts.sum: "We had to modify training for a lot of players," Mikel Arteta said when asked for the latest on White and Timber amid their training absence. As such, it is unclear who Arteta will deploy on the right of defence especially with Takehiro Tomiyasu only just returning to training following a two-month injury absence.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Southampton - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Ahead of the match against Southampton Arsenal sit in third place in the Premier League table. As ever, highlights of the game will be available to watch on Match of the Day on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: 'Better than ever': Mikel Arteta says £45m Arsenal player has never trained as hard as he's doing now
arts.sum: Arsenal are currently in great form and will be looking to remain unbeaten going into the October international break. The Gunners have also had to...

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale reveals private text message from David Raya after leaving Arsenal
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale left Arsenal for Southampton in a £25million deal this summer, and he's revealed that he received a text from David Raya shortly after his departure from the north London side

arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard delivers huge injury update and details return timeline at Arsenal
arts.sum: Commenting in this weekend’s Arsenal matchday programme ahead of the visit of Southampton, Odegaard said: “I just wanted to start with the latest on my injury and rehab. Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard says his ankle injury does not seem as bad as first feared and hopes to be back in action before long with recovery going “really good”.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news and return dates vs Southampton
arts.sum: With that said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal injury updates along with some potential return dates. Ben White and Martin Odegaard are the marquee absentees with Jurrien Timber as a major doubt for Saturday's clash after being subbed off in the 2-0 win against PSG .

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger sends dream William Saliba transfer message amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: When asked what defender he would sign for Real Madrid, Rudiger replied: "I say William Saliba . As a reward for another excellent campaign, Saliba was named in the PFA Premier League Team of the Year for the second successive season.
